atDirectives.name: @tailwind
atDirectives.description: Use the `@tailwind` directive to insert Tailwind's `base`, `components`, `utilities`, and `variants` styles into your CSS.

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Use the `@apply` directive to inline any existing utility classes into your own custom CSS.

atDirectives.name: @layer
atDirectives.description: Use the `@layer` directive to tell Tailwind which 'bucket' a set of custom styles belongs to. Valid layers are `base`, `components`, and `utilities`.

atDirectives.name: @variants
atDirectives.description: Use the `@variants` directive to generate responsive, hover, focus, active, and other variants of your own custom CSS.

atDirectives.name: @responsive
atDirectives.description: Use the `@responsive` directive to generate responsive variants of your own custom CSS.

atDirectives.name: @screen
atDirectives.description: Use the `@screen` directive to create media queries that reference your breakpoints by name instead of duplicating their values in your own CSS.
